metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for the Cluster platform

plugins.name: cluster-experiment
plugins.description: Analyze landing pages and create A/B test experiments on Shopify stores via the Cluster platform. Build variant content incrementally with DOM patches and verify visually.

plugins.name: ethos
plugins.description: Use Ethos as a remote MCP surface for GTM prospecting, enrichment, tables, agent columns, and campaigns without local CLI setup.
